name: langfuse_eval_2_travel_concierge_dataset
description: Dataset for the standalone langfuse_eval_2.py travel concierge harness.

cases.name: inspiration_beach_asia
cases.input: Inspire me about relaxing beach destinations in Asia for a 5 day trip

cases.name: inspiration_activities_peru
cases.input: What activities can I do in Peru if I like culture and nature?

cases.name: planning_london_itinerary
cases.input: Plan a 3 day London itinerary with flights and a hotel

cases.name: booking_payment
cases.input: Book it and show me the payment options before processing

cases.name: pretrip_pack_visa
cases.input: Give me a pre-trip update: visa, advisory, and what to pack

cases.name: intrip_monitor
cases.input: Monitor my flight and help me during the trip if there is a delay

cases.name: posttrip_feedback
cases.input: Collect my post trip feedback and remember that I prefer quiet hotels
